irene_research_goals.pedagogical_intent: Learner needs the primary-source basis for the national expenditure and practice-ownership trend figures to trust the opening structural argument.
Learner needs stronger evidence grounding for the administrative waste and burnout claims so the burnout-as-design-problem reframing feels authoritative.
Learner needs the evidence basis behind AI adoption, remote monitoring outcomes, and VR training examples to distinguish hype from substantiated innovation.
Learner needs a concrete exemplar basis for digital front door design so the concept is understood as operational infrastructure, not marketing language.
Learner needs the evidence basis for the leadership-interest versus training gap to support the lesson's concluding leadership mandate.
